reforms.description: The Commonwealth Government launched a wide-ranging programme to improve vocational education and training, which included measures such as a training guarantee levy and greater support for on-the-job training.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Improving vocational education and training enhances the skills of the workforce, which supports productivity and innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The programme has been launched and is in force.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant structural change in vocational education and training.
reforms.source_quote: The Commonwealth Government launched a wide ranging programme to improve vocational education and training in 1989.

reforms.description: The Government announced initiatives to establish a network of co-operative research centres to enhance collaboration between industry and research institutions.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing collaboration between industry and research institutions facilitates the transfer of knowledge and technology, which can lead to innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The initiatives have been announced but are not yet implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: The initiative is significant in promoting collaboration but does not represent a structural change.
reforms.source_quote: The Government has announced a number of initiatives to establish a network of co-operative research centres.
